note: Persona-centric workflow playbooks for AskHawk. Each entry tells a specific persona how to complete a specific task across the platform. Stored as KbArticle (one per persona+workflow) + KbChunk (the playbook body). productArea: workflow_guide. Tags: persona, module, role-key. Frontend route paths in deepLinks let the chat answer link directly into the screen.

playbooks.title: Create a new audit
playbooks.summary: Initiate a new supplier audit from the buyer console.
triggers: how do i open an audit
steps: Hover **Supplier Collaboration** in the top nav → click **New Audit**
Pick the supplier from the dropdown (only suppliers with active affiliation appear)
Pick the product (e.g. Atorvastatin Calcium) and the manufacturing site
Select audit type (Routine / For-cause / Re-qualification)
Pick a Lead Auditor — only auditors with active affiliation + qualification + no COI for this supplier appear
Set proposed audit dates (system blocks dates that conflict with the auditor's calendar)
Click **Create + send intimation** — the supplier receives an intimation letter to acknowledge

playbooks.title: Assign or reassign auditor on an existing audit
playbooks.summary: Change the auditor on an open audit (e.g. when initial assignee declines or has a COI).
steps: Open EQMS → **Audits**, find the audit row, click **Assign auditor**
Confirm the supplier shown (the dropdown filters auditors by COI for that supplier)
Pick the new lead — system shows their current capacity + open audits
Optionally add a co-auditor
Submit. The new auditor receives a notification + the prior auditor (if any) is released
If the audit was already past PREP, the system resets PREP to IN_PROGRESS so artifacts can be re-confirmed

playbooks.title: Open a CAPA from an audit observation
playbooks.summary: Convert an auditor's finding into a tracked CAPA with an owner and due date.
steps: Open the audit → **Observations** tab
Click the observation, hit **Recommend CAPA** (AI suggests scope + owner role + due-day window from the root cause)
Edit the AI draft if needed, then **Create CAPA**
Assign owner (typically the supplier QA head for supplier findings) + verify due date
CAPA is created in NEEDS_SUPPLIER status; supplier is notified

playbooks.title: Approve CAPA closure (with e-sig)
playbooks.summary: Final-approve a CAPA that the supplier has fully responded to, signing per Part 11.
steps: Open EQMS → **CAPAs**, filter by status IN_REVIEW
Open the CAPA, review the supplier's evidence + effectiveness check
Click **Approve** → the e-signature dialog appears (password + reason-for-change required)
Sign + submit. Status moves to APPROVED, then CLOSED after the effectiveness window passes
Audit-trail row is auto-written (action: STATUS_APPROVED, actor, signature ID, reason)

playbooks.title: Initiate a change control
playbooks.summary: Open a controlled change to an SOP, equipment, supplier, or specification.
steps: Hover **EQMS** → click **Changes**
Click **+ New Change Control**, fill: title, change type (PROCESS / EQUIPMENT / SUPPLIER / DOC / etc.), description, justification
AI Impact Classifier auto-suggests downstream impact (affected docs, training, validation)
Add reviewers (system auto-routes by change type; QA head + dept owner + Quality Director for major)
Submit — change moves to UNDER_REVIEW; reviewers notified

playbooks.title: Review supplier scorecard + quarterly KPIs
playbooks.summary: Quarterly check on supplier performance metrics.
steps: Hover **Supplier Collaboration** → click **Suppliers**
Pick the supplier; the detail page shows: on-time delivery, OOS rate, deviation rate, complaint rate, open CAPA count, audit history
Review the rolling-90-day risk score (red / amber / green)
If red: open a re-qualification audit or escalate via the supplier-engagement workflow

playbooks.title: Accept an audit assignment
playbooks.summary: Accept a buyer-initiated audit and confirm dates.
steps: Open EQMS → **Audits** — assigned audits appear with **Auditor acceptance pending**
Click the audit, review supplier + product + proposed dates + scope
Click **Accept** — the system records your acceptance + opens the PREP phase
Optionally counter-propose dates if the proposed window conflicts with your calendar — the supplier is notified to re-confirm

playbooks.title: Build the on-site execution checklist
playbooks.summary: Curate the question set you will use during on-site execution.
steps: Open the audit → **Execution Builder** in the toolbar
Review the auto-suggested checklist (sourced from the Pre-Audit Questionnaire template + tenant taxonomy + AI prefill from prior submissions)
Toggle questions in/out of scope; add custom questions; reorder
Click **Lock checklist** when done (Part-11 e-sig). The supplier sees the locked scope before on-site arrival

playbooks.title: Draft an observation with AI
playbooks.summary: Compose a finding using the AI observation drafter, with mandatory citations.
steps: On the audit's execution screen, click an answered question that triggered a finding
Click **Draft observation with AI** — the drafter pulls evidence from the linked questions + cited standards
Review the AI draft: title, observation text with `[Q1] [S1]` citations, classification (OAI/VAI/NAI), severity, recommended CAPA
Edit if needed; if confidence < 0.6 the draft is flagged for closer review
Click **Sign + save** (e-sig prompt) to commit the observation

playbooks.title: Recommend a CAPA from a deviation or finding
playbooks.summary: Use the AI to propose a CAPA shape with corrective + preventive actions.
steps: Open the deviation / observation detail
Click **AI recommend CAPA** — the agent uses the root cause + similar past CAPAs as context
Review the proposed CAPA: title, severity, corrective + preventive actions, owner role, due-day window, effectiveness check method
Click **Apply** to create the CAPA in NEEDS_SUPPLIER status with the AI shape pre-populated

playbooks.title: Sign + finalize the audit report
playbooks.summary: Close out an audit with the e-signed final report.
steps: Open the audit → **Closure** tab
Verify all observations are signed, all CAPAs are at least NEEDS_SUPPLIER, all required artifacts present
Set facility outcome (SATISFACTORY / NEEDS_IMPROVEMENT / UNSATISFACTORY)
Click **Generate closure certificate** — drafts an audit-wide summary
Click **Sign + close** (e-sig) — audit moves to CLOSED state, supplier is notified, surveillance phase opens

playbooks.title: Accept an audit intimation
playbooks.summary: Acknowledge the buyer's audit notification + propose dates.
steps: Open EQMS → **My Audits** in the supplier sidebar — pending intimations appear
Click the intimation row, review the buyer + scope + proposed dates
Open the **Intimation letter** artifact, sign at the supplier signature block
Counter-propose dates if needed; click **Send to buyer** — the buyer sees your acknowledgement + dates

playbooks.title: Fill the Pre-Audit Questionnaire (PAQ)
playbooks.summary: Respond to the buyer's pre-audit questionnaire with site information.
steps: Open the audit → **Pre-Audit Questionnaire** tab
Click **AI prefill from prior submissions** — auto-fills answers reused across buyers
Review each section, complete unanswered questions, attach supporting documents per question
Assign sub-sections to your team (e.g. Production sections to Amit, QC sections to Deepa)
Once 100% complete, click **Submit to buyer** — the auditor begins their review

playbooks.title: Respond to an auditor observation
playbooks.summary: Reply to a finding raised during or after the audit.
steps: Open the audit → **Observations** tab
Click the observation; review the auditor's text + cited evidence
If you disagree, click **Dispute** + provide rationale + evidence — the auditor reviews
If you accept, click **Accept + propose CAPA** — the system creates a CAPA pre-populated from the observation

playbooks.title: Submit a CAPA action + evidence
playbooks.summary: Provide your corrective + preventive action plan to a CAPA assigned to you.
steps: Open EQMS → **My CAPAs** — CAPAs in NEEDS_SUPPLIER status appear
Click the CAPA, review the buyer/auditor's observation + recommended action
Fill: corrective action, preventive action, owner, target date, effectiveness check method + success criteria
Attach supporting evidence (revised SOPs, training records, validation reports)
Click **Submit for review** — moves to IN_REVIEW; the auditor / buyer is notified

playbooks.title: Acknowledge a buyer-driven change
playbooks.summary: Confirm receipt + impact of a change initiated by your buyer.
steps: Open EQMS → **My Changes** — pending changes appear
Click the change, review the buyer's description + impact assessment
Confirm: any impact on your supply, any actions you need to take, any dates you need to honor
Sign the acknowledgement (e-sig). The buyer sees your confirmation

playbooks.title: Approve an SOP
playbooks.summary: Final-approve a document submitted for review (e-sig gated).
steps: Open EQMS → **Documents** → filter **Pending my approval**
Open the document, review the change diff + impact assessment + scope
Click **Approve** — e-sig dialog appears (password + reason-for-change)
Sign + submit. Document moves to APPROVED. To make it effective, click **Publish** (separate e-sig). Auto-training is triggered if 'requiresTrainingOnUpdate' is set

playbooks.title: Approve CAPA closure for high-severity findings
playbooks.summary: Sign-off on CRITICAL / MAJOR CAPAs that require executive approval.
steps: Open EQMS → **CAPAs** → filter severity = CRITICAL or MAJOR + status IN_REVIEW
Open the CAPA, review root cause + corrective + preventive + effectiveness verification
Click **Approve** — e-sig dialog (password + reason-for-change)
If the effectiveness check passed, the CAPA closes. If pending, the closure waits for the verification window

playbooks.title: Approve a change control
playbooks.summary: Final approval gate for change controls, e-sig per Part 11.
steps: Open EQMS → **Changes** → filter status = UNDER_REVIEW where I'm an approver
Open the change, review impact assessment + dependent actions + effectiveness plan
Click **Approve** — e-sig dialog appears
Sign. Change moves to IMPLEMENTATION; dependent activities (SOP revisions, training, validation) are tracked

playbooks.title: Chair the quarterly Management Review
playbooks.summary: Run the management review meeting end-to-end.
steps: Open EQMS → **Reviews** → click **+ New Management Review**
Click **AI populate inputs** — auto-aggregates KPIs, deviations, audits, CAPAs, complaints, risks for the period
Review each input section, add management commentary, set qmsAdequacy (ADEQUATE / NEEDS_IMPROVEMENT / INADEQUATE)
Add action items: description, owner, due date, priority — each tracked through implementation
Click **Mark complete** — e-sig dialog (password + reason). Review is signed + closed

playbooks.title: Submit a deviation
playbooks.summary: Report a deviation from approved procedures or specifications.
steps: Hover **EQMS** → click **Deviations** → click **+ Report Deviation**
Fill title, description, type (PLANNED / UNPLANNED), area, processStep, productName, batchNumbers
Click **AI suggest classification** — the AI proposes severity + category + reportability flags (FDA Field Alert / MedWatch / Annex 16)
Review and apply the AI suggestion (or override)
Submit — deviation is created in REPORTED status; QA Manager is notified to triage

playbooks.title: Investigate a deviation (5-Why)
playbooks.summary: Conduct root-cause analysis on an open deviation.
steps: Open the deviation detail → click **Investigate**
Click **AI scaffold 5-Why** — the agent drafts a 5-Why structure from the deviation narrative
Refine the why-chain; tag the root cause category (HUMAN / EQUIPMENT / MATERIAL / PROCESS / DOC / TRAINING / SUPPLIER / DESIGN)
Click **AI find similar past deviations** to spot repeat findings
Submit investigation — deviation moves to PENDING_DISPOSITION

playbooks.title: Open a complaint and triage with AI
playbooks.summary: Log a customer complaint + classify severity / reportability automatically.
steps: Hover **EQMS** → click **Complaints** → click **+ New Complaint**
Fill source (customer / regulator / internal), product, batch, complaint description
Click **AI triage** — the agent classifies severity, MDR-reportability, suggested investigation depth, recall trigger
Apply triage; assign investigator; complaint moves to UNDER_INVESTIGATION

playbooks.title: Bulk-upload SOPs with AI classification
playbooks.summary: Drop a folder of SOPs and let the AI classify + route them.
steps: Hover **EQMS** → click **Documents** → click **✨ Bulk upload (AI)**
Drag a folder of PDFs (≤ 50 files, ≤ 25 MB each)
Wait for processing (~10-30s for 30 files; AI extracts title + type + scope + reviewer role)
Review the table — each file is classified with confidence score; edit any low-confidence rows
Click **Done**. Files are created as DRAFT; submit each for review when ready

playbooks.title: Track training compliance
playbooks.summary: Monitor who's overdue on assigned trainings.
steps: Hover **EQMS** → click **Training**
Filter by status = OVERDUE
For each overdue assignment: contact the trainee, mark as completed if recently done, or escalate to the supervisor
If a deviation root-cause is 'training gap': open a CAPA + auto-assign re-training to all affected personnel

playbooks.title: Run a risk assessment
playbooks.summary: Document a risk per ICH Q9 with RPN scoring.
steps: Hover **EQMS** → click **Risk** → click **+ New Risk Item**
Click **AI brainstorm scenarios** — the agent proposes failure modes for the process you specify
Pick the scenarios that apply; for each, score Severity (1-5), Occurrence (1-5), Detectability (1-5)
RPN = S × O × D is auto-calculated; high RPN (>50) triggers an escalation flag
Add mitigations + re-score residual RPN; submit

playbooks.title: Schedule the next Management Review
playbooks.summary: Book the quarterly MRM with the right agenda.
steps: Hover **EQMS** → click **Reviews**
Click **+ New Management Review**, set type = QUARTERLY, planned date, attendees, period covered
The system auto-pre-loads inputs (open CAPAs, recent audits, KPIs); you can pre-aggregate via **AI populate inputs**
Save as PLANNED; calendar invites are sent to attendees; reminders fire 7d / 1d / 1h before

playbooks.title: Create a new controlled document
playbooks.summary: Author + version a new SOP, policy, or work instruction.
steps: Hover **EQMS** → click **Documents** → click **+ New Document**
Fill title, type (SOP / POLICY / WI / FORM / SPECIFICATION / etc.), version (1.0 default), scope, description
Optionally set reviewer role (auto-routed by type), effective date, review-due date, requiresTrainingOnUpdate flag
Attach the file (PDF / DOCX) — uploaded to HawkVault with a sha256 checksum
Save as DRAFT; submit for review when ready

playbooks.title: Submit a document for review
playbooks.summary: Move a DRAFT document into the approval workflow.
steps: Open the DRAFT document
Click **Submit for Review**, pick the reviewer role (e.g. QA Manager, Quality Director)
Confirm reviewers + due dates; submit
Document moves to UNDER_REVIEW; reviewers receive notification + their queue updates

playbooks.title: Publish + supersede a previous version
playbooks.summary: Make an APPROVED document EFFECTIVE and retire the prior version.
steps: Open the APPROVED document, click **Publish**
E-sig dialog appears (password + reason-for-change); sign
Document moves to EFFECTIVE; the previous version (if any) is auto-marked SUPERSEDED
If `requiresTrainingOnUpdate` is set: training is auto-assigned to all affected roles

playbooks.title: Report a production-floor deviation
playbooks.summary: Log an unplanned event from the line.
steps: Hover **EQMS** → click **Deviations** → **+ Report Deviation**
Fill what happened, when, which line / equipment, batch number, immediate actions taken to contain
Click **AI suggest classification**; review
Submit — QA Coordinator triages within their next shift

playbooks.title: Complete an assigned training
playbooks.summary: Acknowledge a training assignment + pass the check.
steps: Hover **My Workspace** → click **My Training**
Open an ASSIGNED training, read the linked SOP / WI
Take the assessment (quiz); ≥80% to pass
Click **Complete** + sign the acknowledgement; status moves to COMPLETED

playbooks.title: Acknowledge a published SOP change
playbooks.summary: Confirm read-and-understand of a revised SOP that affects you.
steps: When an SOP affecting your role is published, you receive a notification + a training assignment auto-appears
Open it from **My Training**; read the SOP
Take the read-and-understand quiz; click **Complete** to sign acknowledgement

playbooks.title: Accept a co-auditor assignment
playbooks.summary: Accept an invitation to support a lead auditor.
steps: Open EQMS → **Audits** — co-assignments appear with role 'Co-Auditor'
Open the audit; review scope + lead auditor + dates
Click **Accept**. You inherit read+evidence-add permissions; the lead retains sign-off authority

playbooks.title: Add evidence + observations as co-auditor
playbooks.summary: Contribute to the audit without final sign-off authority.
steps: On the audit's execution screen, you can answer questions, attach evidence, and propose observations
Use the AI observation drafter (same as the lead) — your drafts go to the lead for sign-off
Cannot finalize / close the audit; that requires the lead auditor's e-sig

playbooks.title: Track FDA warning letters + import alerts
playbooks.summary: Monitor regulatory signals affecting your suppliers + products.
steps: Hover **Marketplace** → click **FDA Intel**
Search by supplier name or product. The system shows warning letters, import alerts, recall classifications
Open a signal — see the affected facility, products, dates, severity
If your supplier is impacted: open a for-cause audit + flag affected batches via the deviation module

playbooks.title: Approve a regulatory specification
playbooks.summary: Sign-off on a SPECIFICATION document affecting market authorization.
steps: Open EQMS → **Documents** → filter Pending my approval
Open the SPECIFICATION; review against current registered details + regulatory implications (any submission needed?)
Click **Approve** (e-sig). If a regulatory submission is needed, open a Change Control with type = REGULATORY

playbooks.title: Maintain the compliance binder
playbooks.summary: Keep audit-trail + e-sig + validation evidence current for regulator inspections.
steps: Hover **EQMS** → use the audit-trail viewer (`/api/audit-trail/by-entity`) to spot-check any record's history
Run the periodic CSV / IQ-OQ-PQ refresh per the latest tenant config
Verify e-signature records are intact — every approval should have a signatureId + reasonForChange
On request: export the binder as a PDF for inspector hand-off
